source: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 (historical version 0, first posted 2025-09-01)
brief_title: Evaluating Anti-Obesity Medications 6 Months After Metabolic Surgery
eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* 6 months after metabolic surgery.
* 18 years <= age <= 55 years.
* Body Mass Index (BMI) >= 28 kg/m^2.
